title: Indulgent Ukrainian Pine Nuts Salad
description: A fragrant, airy salad that blends char-grilled vegetables with toasted pine nuts. The citrus-dill vinaigrette adds a bright lift for a light meal-prep dish.
instructions: Preheat a grill or grill pan over medium-high heat.
Toss sliced zucchini, bell pepper, carrot, and onion with 25ml olive oil, 1g salt, and 1g black pepper.
Spread the seasoned vegetables in a single layer on the grill and cook until charred and softened, about 5 minutes, turning once.
While the veggies grill, toast pine nuts in a dry skillet over medium heat until golden, about 3 minutes, stirring frequently.
In a small bowl, whisk together 25ml lemon juice, 5g Dijon mustard, 25ml olive oil, 2g salt, and 1g black pepper for the vinaigrette.
Remove the grilled vegetables from the grill and let them cool slightly.
In a large bowl, combine the grilled veggies, halved cherry tomatoes, toasted pine nuts, and chopped dill.
Pour the vinaigrette over the salad and toss gently to coat evenly.
Taste and adjust seasoning with extra salt or pepper if needed.
Divide the salad into four containers for meal prep, and chill in the refrigerator before serving.
